fullText: Hi, I'm Robert Curley, technical product marketing manager here at Sonar. And today I'm going to show you a fun new little thing that showed up when you update to the latest 2026.1 LTA release of Sonar Cube Server. When you first sign in, you'll notice a new little bell in the corner up here. This bell is a new notification center where we will send you product news and information about new things that are featured inside Sonar Cube. We hope you use it, we hope you like it, and we hope it's a non-invasive way to get the latest and greatest information about what we're doing here at Sonar. Thanks, and I'll see you at the next demo.
